title: Cobblemon Fossil Tweaks
description: Tweak the Cobblemon fossil workflow as you please!
body:
A sidemod for Cobblemon, giving you the ability to tweak the way the fossil workflow works!

With this mod, you can:

* Change the amount of ticks required to generate fossils using the resurrection machine.
* Change the shiny rate for Pokemon generated with the resurrection machine.

In order to change the settings for the mod, run the game once with the mod installed, then head into your config directory, modify as you see fit, save, and re-run the game!

[Come visit us on the Discord!](https://discord.gg/WKAR27SdSv)
